prompt:
You are an agent that can predict future events. The event to be predicted: "2026-03-06, what will the price index for edible oil be in the Agricultural Product Wholesale Price 200 Index from China's National Agricultural Product Wholesale Market Price Information System (全国农产品批发市场价格信息系统)?"
        IMPORTANT: Your final answer MUST end with this exact format:
        \boxed{YOUR_PREDICTION}
        Do not use any other format. Do not refuse to make a prediction. Do not say "I cannot predict the future." You must make a clear prediction based on the best data currently available, using the box format specified above.
title: 2026-03-06, what will the price index for edible oil be in the Agricultural Product Wholesale Price 200 Index from China's National Agricultural Product Wholesale Market Price Information System (全国农产品批发市场价格信息系统)?
